biteByNightBeginnerGuide.title: Bite By Night Beginner Guide
biteByNightBeginnerGuide.intro: Start by understanding the core loop: survivors complete objectives while killers hunt them down. Choose your class wisely, stick with your team, and learn the maps to maximize your survival chances.

steps.title: Choose Your Class
steps.description: Each class has unique abilities. Start with a well-rounded class to learn the basics before specializing in support, stealth, or utility roles.

steps.title: Learn the Objectives
steps.description: Survivors must complete generators, repair systems, or activate exits. Knowing the objective layout on each map is critical for efficient play.

steps.title: Stay Aware of the Killer
steps.description: Killers have unique powers and movement patterns. Listen for audio cues, watch for visual indicators, and always have an escape route planned.

steps.title: Coordinate with Your Team
steps.description: Communication and teamwork are essential. Split objectives, callout killer positions, and rescue downed teammates when safe.

quickTips: Always have an escape route planned before starting an objective.
Use barricades strategically to slow down killers, not just block paths.
Learn the map layouts early — knowing shortcuts can save your life.
Stick with at least one teammate when possible for safety.

biteByNightClassTierList.title: Bite By Night Class Tier List
biteByNightClassTierList.intro: Classes in Bite By Night fill different roles in the survivor team. Some excel at solo play, others shine in coordinated groups. Here is how they stack up based on current community knowledge.

cards.name: Team-Oriented Classes
cards.description: Classes that provide buffs, healing, or utility to nearby teammates. These are strongest in coordinated groups.

cards.name: Solo-Viable Classes
cards.description: Classes with stealth or escape abilities that can operate independently. Good for solo queue or split-objective strategies.

cards.name: Utility Classes
cards.description: Classes focused on objective speed, barricade efficiency, or information gathering. They accelerate the team's win condition.

cards.name: Balanced Classes
cards.description: Well-rounded classes suitable for beginners. They offer a mix of survival tools without excelling in any single area.

milestones: Adapt class picks to killer matchup

biteByNightKillerGuide.title: Bite By Night Killer Guide
biteByNightKillerGuide.intro: Killers in Bite By Night each have unique abilities and playstyles. Understanding their strengths helps both killer and survivor players make better decisions in every match.

items.name: Animatronic Killers
items.description: Killers inspired by Five Nights at Freddy's lore. They tend to have ambush and stealth-based abilities.

items.name: Pursuit Killers
items.description: Killers designed for aggressive chasing. They have mobility or speed advantages during active pursuits.

items.name: Control Killers
items.description: Killers that dominate specific areas of the map. They excel at guarding objectives and cutting off escape routes.

biteByNightMapBreakdown.title: Bite By Night Map Breakdown
biteByNightMapBreakdown.intro: Maps in Bite By Night feature distinct layouts with unique hazards, objective placements, and escape routes. Knowing each map gives survivors a significant advantage.

solutions.name: Forest Map
solutions.description: Open sightlines but limited cover. Multiple generator locations spread across a wide area. Watch for ambush points near trees and structures.

solutions.name: Industrial Map
solutions.description: Tight corridors mixed with open yards. Barricades are especially effective here. Multiple floors create vertical escape options.

solutions.name: Facility Map
solutions.description: Close-quarters with limited visibility. Killers have the advantage in tight spaces, but survivors can use doors and vents for escape.

solutions.name: Mixed Maps
solutions.description: Combined indoor and outdoor areas with transitions between open space and enclosed rooms. Adaptable strategies work best here.

managementTips: Learn generator spawn points for each map.
Identify the strongest barricade positions before the match starts.
Know the exit locations and the fastest paths to reach them.
Use environmental features like doors and vents to break line of sight.

biteByNightObjectivesGuide.title: Bite By Night Objectives Guide
biteByNightObjectivesGuide.intro: Survivors must complete a series of objectives to escape. Understanding the task flow and prioritizing efficiently is the difference between winning and losing.

cards.name: Power Generators
cards.description: Locate and activate generators scattered across the map. Each generator completed brings you closer to unlocking the exit.

cards.name: Barricading System
cards.description: Use barricades to block paths and slow down killers. Place them at choke points and near objectives for maximum value.

cards.name: Exit Activation
cards.description: Once enough objectives are complete, activate the exit. This usually requires teamwork and creates a high-tension final phase.

cards.name: Time Pressure
cards.description: Matches have time limits. Survivors must balance speed with safety — rushing objectives increases risk but delaying means running out of time.

biteByNightSkinsGallery.title: Bite By Night Skins Gallery
biteByNightSkinsGallery.intro: Skins in Bite By Night range from common cosmetics to rare event-exclusive looks. Here is what we know about the cosmetic system so far.

regions.name: Common Skins
regions.description: Basic cosmetic options available to all players. These are typically unlocked through normal gameplay.

regions.name: Rare Skins
regions.description: Less common cosmetics that may require specific challenges, playtime milestones, or in-game currency.

regions.name: Event Skins
regions.description: Limited-time skins tied to seasonal events or special promotions. These become unavailable after the event ends.

regions.name: Killer Skins
regions.description: Cosmetic options for killer characters. These change the visual appearance of killer models and effects.

biteByNightActiveCodes.title: Bite By Night Active Codes
biteByNightActiveCodes.intro: Codes in Bite By Night grant free rewards like skins, currency, and other items. Check back regularly as new codes are released with updates and events.

creatures.name: Current Status
creatures.description: There are currently no confirmed active codes for Bite By Night. The game just launched — codes are expected to drop with events and milestones.

creatures.name: How to Redeem
creatures.description: Open the game on Roblox, look for the codes button in the main menu, enter the code exactly as shown, and claim your reward.

creatures.name: Where to Find Codes
creatures.description: Official codes are typically announced on Discord, X (Twitter), and the Roblox game description. Community sources like Reddit also track them.

creatures.name: Expired Codes
creatures.description: No expired codes yet. As codes are released and expire, they will be tracked here for reference.

biteByNightLoreAndStory.title: Bite By Night Lore and Story
biteByNightLoreAndStory.intro: Bite By Night draws heavy inspiration from Five Nights at Freddy's and Dead by Daylight, creating its own horror universe within Roblox. Here is what we know about the game's lore so far.

items.name: FNAF Connections
items.description: The game features animatronic-style killers clearly inspired by the FNAF franchise. Character designs reference classic animatronics with a Roblox twist.

items.name: Game Setting
items.description: Matches take place in various horror-themed locations. The environments suggest an abandoned facility, forest, and industrial zones.

items.name: Character Origins
items.description: Each killer has a backstory that connects to the game's world. Community discussion frequently explores possible FNAF character parallels.

items.name: World Building
items.description: The game's lore is still being revealed through trailers, teasers, and in-game details. The community is actively piecing together the full story.

biteByNightKillerCounters.title: Bite By Night Killer Counters
biteByNightKillerCounters.intro: Each killer in Bite By Night has specific weaknesses that survivors can exploit. Learning these counter strategies dramatically improves your survival rate.

sections.name: Audio Awareness
sections.description: Most killers produce audio cues before attacking. Learning to recognize these sounds gives you extra reaction time.

sections.name: Line of Sight Breaks
sections.description: Breaking the killer's line of sight around corners and through doorways is the most reliable escape technique.

sections.name: Barricade Timing
sections.description: Well-timed barricade placement during a chase can create enough distance to escape or regroup with teammates.

sections.name: Team Distraction
sections.description: Coordinated distractions where one player draws killer attention while others complete objectives is a high-level strategy.

growthMilestones: Break line of sight in chases

biteByNightBestStrategies.title: Bite By Night Best Strategies
biteByNightBestStrategies.intro: Winning in Bite By Night requires a mix of individual skill and team coordination. These are the most effective strategies based on community experience.

priorities.name: Split Objectives
priorities.description: Splitting into pairs to work on multiple objectives simultaneously is the fastest path to escape. Never group all survivors on one generator.

priorities.name: Map Knowledge
priorities.description: Knowing the map layout — escape routes, barricade spots, generator locations — gives you a massive advantage over players who are still learning.

priorities.name: Class Synergy
priorities.description: Picking classes that complement each other creates stronger teams. Balance stealth, support, and utility roles.

priorities.name: Killer Adaptation
priorities.description: Adapting your strategy based on which killer you are facing. Aggressive killers require different tactics than stealth killers.

priorities.name: Exit Coordination
priorities.description: The exit phase is the most dangerous. Coordinate your final push — one player activates while others distract or guard.

priorities.name: Resource Management
priorities.description: Use barricades, abilities, and items efficiently. Wasting resources early can leave you vulnerable in the critical final moments.

biteByNightSurvivalTips.title: Bite By Night Survival Tips
biteByNightSurvivalTips.intro: Surviving in Bite By Night requires awareness, teamwork, and smart decision-making. These tips cover the fundamentals every player should know.

achievements.title: Always Have an Exit Plan
achievements.description: Before starting any objective, identify your nearest escape route.

achievements.title: Use Audio Cues
achievements.description: Listen for killer footsteps, music changes, and ambient sounds.

achievements.title: Don't Panic
achievements.description: Use turns, obstacles, and barricades to break line of sight.

achievements.title: Barricade During Chase
achievements.description: Drop barricades at key moments to create distance from the killer.

achievements.title: Help Your Team
achievements.description: Rescue downed teammates and share killer location info.

achievements.title: Split Objectives
achievements.description: Work on separate generators to complete tasks faster.

achievements.title: Learn from Deaths
achievements.description: Analyze what the killer did and what you could do differently.

achievements.title: Watch Good Players
achievements.description: Observe experienced players to learn advanced techniques.

biteByNightClassAbilities.title: Bite By Night Class Abilities
biteByNightClassAbilities.intro: Each survivor class in Bite By Night has unique abilities that define their role. Understanding these abilities helps you choose the right class for your playstyle.

faqs.question: What are Passive Abilities?
faqs.answer: Background bonuses that are always in effect. These define the class's base strengths without any input from the player.

faqs.question: What are Active Abilities?
faqs.answer: Abilities that must be activated and have cooldowns. Timing these correctly in clutch moments is what separates good players.

faqs.question: What are Team Abilities?
faqs.answer: Abilities that benefit nearby teammates. These create strong synergies when classes are paired correctly.

faqs.question: What are Utility Abilities?
faqs.answer: Abilities that speed up objectives, improve barricades, or provide information about the map and killer position.

faqs.question: How do I choose the right class?
faqs.answer: Consider your playstyle. If you like teamwork, pick support classes. If you prefer independence, pick stealth classes. Utility classes work best for objective-focused play.

biteByNightKillerAbilities.title: Bite By Night Killer Abilities
biteByNightKillerAbilities.intro: Killers in Bite By Night have powerful abilities that define how they hunt survivors. Understanding these powers is essential for both playing as and against each killer.

faqs.question: What are Chase Abilities?
faqs.answer: Powers that help killers close distance on running survivors. These include speed boosts, teleports, and gap-closing attacks.

faqs.question: What are Detection Abilities?
faqs.answer: Powers that reveal survivor locations. These include aura reading, noise tracking, and area scanning.

faqs.question: What are Zone Control Abilities?
faqs.answer: Powers that let killers dominate specific areas. These include traps, barriers, and area denial effects.

faqs.question: What are Stealth Abilities?
faqs.answer: Powers that let killers approach unseen. These include invisibility, reduced terror radius, and silent movement.

faqs.question: How do I counter killer abilities?
faqs.answer: Learn each killer's specific weaknesses. Stay aware of audio cues, use barricades strategically, and coordinate with your team to exploit their blind spots.

biteByNightLatestNews.title: Bite By Night Latest News
biteByNightLatestNews.intro: Bite By Night is actively in development with regular reveals and updates. Here are the most important announcements and milestones.

settings.name: Official Launch
settings.description: Bite By Night officially launched on Roblox on March 28, 2026, after months of community anticipation and trailer reveals.

settings.name: Official Trailer
settings.description: The official trailer was released on the OzelBlox YouTube channel, showcasing gameplay, killers, and map environments.

settings.name: Discord Growth
settings.description: The official Discord server has grown to over 231,000 members, making it one of the largest Roblox horror communities.

settings.name: Future Updates
settings.description: New killers, classes, maps, and seasonal events are expected in post-launch content updates.

biteByNightReleaseTimeline.title: Bite By Night Release Timeline
biteByNightReleaseTimeline.intro: Track the key dates and milestones in Bite By Night's development journey from announcement to launch.

entries.title: Game Announcement
entries.description: Bite By Night was first announced by OzelBlox, generating immediate interest from the FNAF and Roblox horror communities.

entries.title: Trailer Drop
entries.description: The official trailer showcased the game's asymmetrical horror gameplay, animatronic killers, and multiple map environments.

entries.title: Official Launch - March 28, 2026
entries.description: Bite By Night launched on Roblox with 4 survivor classes, 3 killers, and multiple maps on March 28, 2026.

biteByNightCommunityFAQ.title: Bite By Night Community FAQ
biteByNightCommunityFAQ.intro: Answers to the most common questions players have about Bite By Night.

steps.title: What platform is Bite By Night on?
steps.description: Bite By Night is a Roblox game. You can play it for free through the Roblox platform.

steps.title: Is Bite By Night free to play?
steps.description: Yes. Bite By Night is free to play on Roblox. There may be optional cosmetic purchases.

steps.title: How many players per match?
steps.description: Bite By Night features asymmetrical gameplay with multiple survivors versus one killer per match.

steps.title: Is Bite By Night related to FNAF?
steps.description: Bite By Night is inspired by Five Nights at Freddy's and Dead by Daylight but is an original Roblox game, not an official FNAF product.

steps.title: Are there active codes for Bite By Night?
steps.description: Currently there are no confirmed active codes. Codes are expected to be released with future updates and events.

steps.title: When was Bite By Night released?
steps.description: Bite By Night officially launched on Roblox on March 28, 2026.

steps.title: Who made Bite By Night?
steps.description: Bite By Night was developed by OzelBlox and the Totally Not Secret Games team on Roblox.

steps.title: How do I report bugs?
steps.description: Join the official Discord server to report bugs in the dedicated bug-reports channel.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Bite By Night

questions.question: What is Bite By Night?
questions.answer: Bite By Night is a Roblox asymmetrical horror game inspired by FNAF and Dead by Daylight. Survivors work together to complete objectives while a killer hunts them down.

questions.question: Is Bite By Night free?
questions.answer: Yes. Bite By Night is free to play on the Roblox platform.

questions.question: How many classes are there?
questions.answer: Bite By Night launched with 4 survivor classes, each with unique abilities and roles.

questions.question: How many killers are in the game?
questions.answer: The game launched with 3 killers, each featuring distinct abilities and playstyles.

questions.question: Are there codes for Bite By Night?
questions.answer: Currently there are no active codes. Codes are expected to arrive with future updates and events.

questions.question: Where can I find the official community?
questions.answer: The official Discord server has over 231,000 members. You can also follow @bitebynightdev on X and Instagram.

cta.title: Ready to Play Bite By Night?
cta.description: Join the Bite By Night community on Discord for guides, updates, codes, and discussions!
